command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute 
SELECT c.id AS customer_id, c.name, c.company
FROM customers c
WHERE c.company LIKE '%Sepia%' OR c.name LIKE '%Keck%' OR c.name LIKE '%Sepia%';

customer_id	name	company
